response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong breadth across languages and domains, and some relevant distributed-systems exposure at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume shows no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, telemetry pipelines, or statistical/bias-detection methods — all of which are core to this Principal-level role. His current title is Senior Software Developer, not Principal/IC6, and the resume lacks the cross-team leadership, growth engineering, and measurement-platform ownership the position demands.
strengths: Broad language coverage (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, D) aligns with the required tech stack
Real high-throughput distributed-systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency async I/O)
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at Acme Software shows adaptability to emerging platform paradigms
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no mention of A/B testing, feature flags, rollout automation, or bias/guardrail frameworks
Seniority gap: current and historical titles are Senior/Staff, not Principal/IC6; no evidence of org-wide technical leadership or multi-team initiative ownership
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work visible anywhere in the resume despite these being hard requirements

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope gap vs. IC6 expectations
